calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Terms Of Trust; To Appoint Corporate Trustee; For Reimbursement For Payment Of Trust Expenses; And Related Relief
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Case Transferred

Petition: 1. To Determine Validity Of Purported Amendment To The Kathryn Loftus 2017 Trust, And Purported Power Of Attorney; 2. For Financial Elder Abuse
For Payment Of Attorney Fees. For Compensatory And Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Oct-09-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Proceedings To Proper Venue And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Lamping appeared by zoom for Michael Desmond (moving party).
Micheal Freedman appeared by zoom for Sean Desmond (opposing party).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions as to whether Probate Code 17002(a) applies, whether 17200 applies under (b)(2), the use of different terminology by the legislature, the issue of whether the principal place of trust administration is the principal residence of either co-trustee, whether the issue to change venue is premature/whether it is appropriate, the day to day administration of the trust by Michael having occurred in Sonoma County, the issue of what happened to the $250,000.00 loan, the issue of wrong doing, etc. Upon conclusion of argument, the court adopts its tentative ruling. The Motion to Transfer Proceedings to Proper Venue and for Sanctions is granted in part and denied in part.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Aguerre. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Proceedings To Proper Venue And For Sanctions (Added To Calendar For Tentative Ruling Entry Purposes Only.)
